title: gymnacranthera farquhariana var. major
intro: Gymnacranthera farquhariana var. major is a plant species belonging to the family Myristicaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnacranthera farquhariana var. major include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and also used in herbal formulations such as capsules and ointments.
